name: pict-section-checklist
description: Inline-editable, nestable checklists for Pict: leaf checkboxes, per-tier and overall progress, a read-only view, and a pluggable data provider that defaults to in-memory AppData so it works in the browser with no backend.

scripts.build: npx quack build && (cd example_applications/checklist_demo && npx quack build && npx quack copy) && (cd example_applications/checklist_backend_demo && npx quack build && npx quack copy)

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>
